messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "a1ae5b69-11d5-4447-a03b-0c945779c3a9", "article_id": "28edc930-ffa8-4e67-be98-c806388a036a", "source_name": "Allure", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "brand_positioning_statement", "brand": "Reale Actives", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["They were all white bottles with black fonts... I always felt a little bored… I'm really excited to make acne sexy and hot", "packaged in sleek silver and mint"], "anchor_json": {"spokesperson": "Alix Earle", "personal_motivation": "struggles with cystic acne for five years", "brand": "Reale Actives"}}, {"event_frame_id": "c19ae037-ca57-4772-a960-51189aaca796", "article_id": "28edc930-ffa8-4e67-be98-c806388a036a", "source_name": "Allure", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "trademark_filing_discovery", "brand": "Reale Actives", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Earlier this week, online sleuths discovered Earle had trademarked \"Reale Actives,\" and now, the cat is officially out of the bag"], "anchor_json": {"discovery_method": "online investigation", "brand": "Reale Actives"}}, {"event_frame_id": "cd9cbda0-b1cc-47e8-b860-058339278a05", "article_id": "28edc930-ffa8-4e67-be98-c806388a036a", "source_name": "Allure", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "product_launch", "brand": "Reale Actives", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["The four products in the Reale Actives debut lineup—available to shop on March 31—are packaged in sleek silver and mint", "A mandelic acid serum priced at $39 is the breakout-reducing workhorse of the line; a ceramide- and hyaluronic acid-packed moisturizer ($36), makeup-removing cleansing balm ($29), and exfoliating gel cleanser ($28) round out the collection"], "anchor_json": {"founder": "Alix Earle", "collaborator": "Dr. Kiran Mian (dermatologist)", "development_duration": "about two years", "positioning": "acne-first skin-care line", "brand": "Reale Actives"}}]}
